findings.title: Platform page tests 100% broken due to missing useSearchParams mock
findings.issue: vi.mock('next/navigation') was missing useSearchParams export while page.tsx uses useSearchParams(). All 9 page tests failed.
findings.suggestion: Added useSearchParams: () => new URLSearchParams() to the mock.
findings.impact: No test coverage for the entire admin evals UI page.

findings.title: Batch generation missing rate limiting delay
findings.issue: The spec mandates rate limiting for batch generation (line 168) and the task plan specifies a 2-second delay between LLM calls (T-008 step 4). No delay was implemented.
findings.suggestion: Added 2-second delay after each successful generation.
findings.impact: Running generate-all on 42+ skills would flood the Anthropic API with rapid sequential requests, likely triggering rate limits.

findings.title: UTF-8 encoding bug in GitHub eval-content client
findings.issue: atob/btoa only handle Latin1 characters. If evals.json contains UTF-8 characters (non-Latin text, emojis), decode/encode would fail or corrupt data.
findings.suggestion: Changed to TextDecoder/TextEncoder for proper UTF-8 support in both fetch and commit paths.
findings.impact: Silently corrupted content when editing/committing evals with non-ASCII characters.

findings.title: DiffView uses naive line-by-line comparison instead of proper diff algorithm
findings.issue: The DiffView component does simple index-based line comparison. Inserting or removing a line causes all subsequent lines to show as changed, producing noisy, misleading diffs.
findings.suggestion: Consider implementing LCS-based diff or using a lightweight diff library. Acceptable for V1 given JSON structure (most changes are value edits, not line insertions).
findings.impact: Poor UX when reviewing structural changes, but functional for typical value edits.

findings.title: benchmark.ts async functions use sync fs operations
findings.issue: writeBenchmark and readBenchmark are declared async but use writeFileSync/readFileSync. Callers await them expecting non-blocking I/O, but they block the event loop.
findings.suggestion: Either use fs.promises (writeFile/readFile) or remove the async keyword. Low priority since CLI context is single-threaded.
findings.impact: No functional impact in CLI context. Misleading API contract.

acCoverage.note: AC-US8-01/02/03 are in T-013 (pending) which requires actual batch generation against specweave repo with real LLM calls.
